items.title: Inside MSC Cruises’ Partnership with ORCA to Strengthen Marine Research
items.summary: Alaska’s reputation as a bucket list cruise destination rests largely on its wildlife encounters, especially whale sightings. MSC Cruises is treating its first season in the region as a research opportunity, exploring how marine science can guide operations in high-density wildlife corridors.

items.title: Marriott Sees Middle East Travel Dip, Expands AI Tools
items.summary: Marriott highlighted two forces shaping the hotel industry right now - geopolitical volatility and a race to build AI tools that keep travelers inside its direct channels.

items.title: Europe Travelers Swap Planes for Trains, but Climate Isn’t the Driver
items.summary: For destinations, businesses and tourism boards trying to accelerate an emissions shift, framing green transport as a better journey, not a greener one, may be the more effective pitch.

items.title: Minor Hotels to Launch Wolseley in New York, Then Dubai
items.summary: Minor is using Wolseley to test whether a storied restaurant brand can become a broader luxury platform, starting in New York and likely next in Dubai.

items.title: New Research: Why All-Inclusive Travel Is Having a Moment
items.summary: All-inclusive vacations are becoming more popular with travelers, who are seeking highly personalized experiences and a wide range of activities that maximize their travel investments. New data proves that this is more than a trend.

items.title: Indian Hotels’ Cooking Gas Shut Off By Iran War
items.summary: A combination of the Iran war and India’s reliance on imported fuel is shutting down hotel kitchens and train galleys while sending up airline ticket prices.

items.title: Canadian Travel Slumps, Hilton Sounds Alarm, Airbnb Ops Push
items.summary: On today’s Skift Daily Briefing, ⁠Sarah Dandashy⁠ breaks down how shifting Canadian demand is reshaping airline routes, why Hilton sees massive upside if the U.S. rebuilds inbound travel strategy, and how Airbnb’s latest leadership hire supports its push to scale services, experiences, and trip plan

items.title: Hyatt CFO on Global Shocks: Wealthy Travelers Aren’t Canceling Trips
items.summary: Hyatt's luxury-heavy customer base is rerouting trips rather than avoiding travel after recent violence in Mexico and a war in Iran.

items.title: The Middle East’s Aviation Risk: 3 Airlines, 1 Fragile Global Network
items.summary: Global travel flows depend heavily on just three airlines. When geopolitics disrupts one hub, the shock can quickly ripple worldwide.

items.title: U.S. Citizen Stuck in Qatar Hopes for a Repatriation Flight While Scheduled Service is Cancelled
items.summary: With limited exceptions, the U.S. State Department is running the show right now in determining which Americans get onto flights out of Qatar.

items.title: 希尔顿集团登陆蒙古国市场,成功签约乌兰巴托地标项目

items.title: 国泰航空2025年净利润达108亿港元，载客量增长近三成｜最前线
items.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

国泰航空（00293.HK）近日公布2025年全年业绩。财报数据显示，国泰集团2025年实现收益1167.66亿港元，同比增长11.9%；集团应占溢利108亿港元，同比增长9.1%。这是国泰连续第三年录得盈利，三年累计盈利超过300亿港元，已覆盖疫情期间的累计亏损。

业绩主要受客运运力持续恢复和载客率维持高位驱动。官方数据显示，2025年国泰航空及香港快运合计载客达3600万人次，同比增长27%。但客运收益率随市场供应增加而正常化，部分抵销了收入增幅。

items.title: 科氪 | AWE 2026再携重磅阵容，MOVA全面披露芯片战略，擎画“主动时代”技术版图
items.summary:
2026年3月12日，中国上海——当人工智能加速从模型能力走向系统能力，家庭场景正成为AI规模化落地的关键单元。今日，全球超高端AI智慧生活引领者MOVA在中国家电及消费电子博览会（AWE 2026）开幕首日，首次系统披露自研芯片战略，并对外阐释其“家庭AI系统”技术架构及多项生态布局。

依托AWE 2026“一展双区”的创新布局，MOVA以“智见新宇宙，慧享新生活”为主题亮相上海新国际博览中心。本次发布中，MOVA带来5项行业级首创技术、32项体系级创新技术以及31款创新产品。这不仅是一次产品的集中展示，更是MOVA以芯片与AI算法为底层能力构建智慧生活生态的具象呈现

items.title: 阿迪达斯在上海做了一场“速度实验”，把跑步、F1和音乐放进同一场景｜最前线
items.summary:
在跑步成为城市生活方式的一部分后，品牌之间的竞争也从单纯的性能转向文化表达。

在2026上海半程马拉松和F1中国大奖赛开赛前夕，德国运动品牌阿迪达斯在上海滨江搭建了一场名为“竞速实验场”的线下活动。品牌把跑步、赛车和音乐放在同一场景中，通过运动员、赛车手和音乐人的跨界合作，对于一个已经拥有七十多年历史的运动品牌来说，这或许是重新解释“速度”的一种方式。

活动现场的三位核心人物分别是单板滑雪奥运冠军苏翊鸣、George Russell（梅赛德斯-AMG F1车手）以及音乐人窦靖童。开场环节中，Russell驾驶AMG跑车

items.summary: Some people rarely lose things. Wallets are always exactly where they’re supposed to be, keys never go missing, and remotes never slip between the couch cushions. And then there’s the rest of us — the folks who can’t ever seem to find the thing that was right there a few seconds ago. For us, there [

items.title: Google Chrome is coming to Arm-powered Linux devices later this year
items.summary: You can download Chrome for Linux, and you can download Chrome for Arm devices - but if you've got a computer running Linux on Arm, not so much! Now, Google says it's finally bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux machines in Q2 2026, following Chrome for Arm Macs in 2020 and Chrome for Windows on Arm [&#82

items.title: What it was like to watch grieving parents stare down Mark Zuckerberg in court
items.summary: Around a dozen parents huddled in the dim hallway outside the courtroom in February, nervously gripping paper tickets. They were glaring at a gray tote bag held by a member of the court staff - the one who'd determine, by lottery, if they made it inside. Pinned on bags and coats, butterfly clips hon

items.title: The original AirTag is the cheapest it’s ever been
items.summary: Despite the fact Apple released a new AirTag in January, the first-generation AirTag is still a top-notch tracker if you’re embedded in Apple’s ecosystem. And right now, it’s on sale for $13.91 ($15.09 off) at Walmart, which marks a new low price.  If you’re an iPhone owner, the original AirTag stil

items.title: KPop Demon Hunters is getting a sequel, obviously
items.summary: Get ready to get even more K-pop, demonier, and as huntery as possible. Netflix's smash-hit, Oscar-nominated animated film KPop Demon Hunters is returning for a sequel, with the fictional Korean girl group HUNTR/X coming back to lay down pop hits and smash evil boy bands (and/or other demons). Maggi

items.title: Facebook Marketplace adds AI auto-replies for annoying ‘Is this still available?’ messages
items.summary: Facebook Marketplace is adding a bunch of new AI-powered tools that are supposed to make selling items on the platform a little more efficient. One feature will use Meta AI to automatically respond to those annoying "Is this still available?" messages. You can toggle on the auto-reply option when cr

items.title: Gemini’s task automation is here and it’s wild
items.summary: A couple of weeks ago, Google and Samsung announced a big Gemini development coming to their newest devices: task automation. Starting with food delivery and rideshare apps, Gemini would be able to use certain apps on your behalf in a virtual window to take care of things like ordering dinner or get

items.title: Google’s TV Streamer 4K doubles as a smart home hub and it’s on sale
items.summary: Between March Madness and the Oscars, now might be a good time to improve your TV setup. Google’s TV Streamer 4K is currently on sale for $79.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, Target, and Walmart, which is its second-best price to date and only $5 more than its all-time low. As a streaming device, it’s terrif

items.title: 中国在科技领先与创造就业之间寻求平衡
items.summary: 中国政府继续强调对科技领先地位的重视，同时提出构建“就业友好型发展方式”，凸显对失业问题日益关注。

items.title: 麦肯锡紧急修复内部AI系统中的漏洞
items.summary: 网络安全公司CodeWall称其入侵了麦肯锡员工使用的AI平台Lilli，在两小时内获得数百万条内部聊天消息的访问权限，并能够识别敏感文件。

items.title: 德银仍有意扩大私募信贷业务
items.summary: 尽管投资者日益担忧私募行业的信贷质量，该行仍致力于“扩大私募信贷产品”，并表示对此类敞口采用“保守的承销标准”。

items.title: 困在海湾的油轮已成“活靶子”
items.summary: 伊朗扩大对海湾航运的袭击，同时没什么迹象表明特朗普承诺的海军护航能够在未来几周启动，上百艘滞留海湾的油轮进退两难。

items.title: 香港廉政公署和香港证监会逮捕八名内幕交易人员
items.summary: 香港廉政公署和香港证监会表示，两家持牌证券公司和一家持牌对冲基金的高级管理人员因涉嫌受贿和内幕交易被捕。

items.title: 英伟达将向AI云服务商Nebius投资20亿美元
items.summary: 此举延续英伟达对合作伙伴和客户的投资热潮。但这家芯片巨头与自身客户达成的此类融资安排引发“循环融资”担忧。

items.title: 欧盟酝酿设定天然气价格上限
items.summary: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩称，欧盟正在考虑提供价格补贴或设定上限等一系列措施，以求“立即缓解”中东冲突引起的欧洲能源价格上涨。

items.title: 印度放宽对中资投资的限制
items.summary: 莫迪内阁发表声明称，放行与印度在陆地接壤的邻国在资本品、电子产品和太阳能电池领域的投资。印度依赖中国技术来提升制造业。

items.title: 德国今年开局“非常疲弱”给复苏前景带来变数
items.summary: 在中东战火推高能源价格之前，德国的出口和制造业就相当疲弱，令人质疑欧洲最大经济体还能不能在2026年反弹。

items.title: 中国交通部就中东航运中断及涨价约谈欧洲巨头
items.summary: 该部就“国际航运经营行为”分别约谈马士基和地中海航运公司负责人，对加收费用、提高运费和暂停航线等行为表达关切。

wechat_note: 公众号源待浏览器自动化方案实现
